name: Lemon Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in water.
2. In a double boiler over gently simmering water, beat egg yolks; add 1/4 cup sugar and lemon juice. Cook, stirring until the mixture coats the bottom of a spoon.
3. Add grated lemon peel, gelatin, and food coloring to the yolk mixture. Stir well.
4. Cool in refrigerator for about half an hour until slightly thickened.
5. In another bowl, beat egg whites with 1/2 cup sugar; fold into the lemon mixture.
6. Fold in whipped topping.
7. Spoon into baked pie shell.
8. Refrigerate 2 to 3 hours before serving. Garnish with chocolate shavings and lemon slices.
